text.title: Research Repository Setup Failure Modes
text.summary: Antipatterns observed in real deployments of Research Repository Setup. Each ties a symptom to a root cause and a concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Team picks Dovetail because 'we already use it' without scoring.
antipattern.fix: Score 3 candidates on 5 axes; document rejections.

antipattern.symptom: Access matrix defines 10 roles upfront; permissions sprawl.
antipattern.fix: Start with 3 roles; expand only when a real use-case demands.

antipattern.symptom: Repo launches with 0 historical studies; adoption stalls.
antipattern.fix: Backfill 90 days before formal launch; users need value on day 1.
